use_case: Whitaker AFib — chart shows warfarin 5 mg as the active prescription; intake form (Whitaker-James-Intake-Form.pdf) lists 'warfarin 2.5 mg daily' under current medications. Verification layer must surface a med_status_conflict warning so the clinician reconciles dose before answering 'is his INR appropriately controlled?'.

blocks.message: Warfarin appears in two source rows with different statuses (5 mg active vs prior 2.5 mg discontinued). Verify dose with patient before relying on chronic-use language.

blocks.text: Warfarin 5 mg is the currently active prescription on the chart.
